intro: Thelycrania excelsa, also known as the 'Tall Panax', is a perennial plant species within the family Asparagaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southern China. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote health and well-being, with reported health benefits including improved cardiovascular function, enhanced immune response, and reduced inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Thelycrania excelsa include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
